Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Weeping Dragon]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Skysworn ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 6''' — The Weeping Dragon was sighted in the Iceflower Continent last year.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 18''' — The Weeping Dragon sleeps in the upper atmosphere on a bed of clouds.}}

== Uncrowned ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 10''' — The Weeping Dragon fought against Northstrider.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 10''' — The Weeping Dragon is an image of a dragon surrounded by crackling lightning.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 11''' — An acolyte of the Weeping Dragon in the Stormcallers uses blue lightning.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 15''' — The Weeping Dragon is a creature that uses living lightning.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 15''' — The Weeping Dragon's lightning caused a landslide.}}

== Wintersteel ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 5''' — The Weeping Dragon brought down the sky.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 7''' — The Weeping Dragon is a cult or entity associated with the Stormcallers.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 11''' — The Weeping Dragon is an entity that Calan is standing with.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 15''' — The Weeping Dragon is a source of lightning madra scales.}}

== Bloodline ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 6''' — The Weeping Dragon is one of the four Dreadgods depicted in a mural.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 17''' — The Weeping Dragon approached with a majestic roar.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 19''' — The Weeping Dragon is a creature that can drift away looking for prey.}}

== Reaper ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 24''' — A miniature Remnant version of the Weeping Dragon exists.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 24''' — The Weeping Dragon dreams of the past while floating on a bed of clouds.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 24''' — The Weeping Dragon is a name for the Dragon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 24''' — The Weeping Dragon fears waking from its dreams.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 24''' — The Weeping Dragon is becoming whole.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 24''' — The Dragon's cry of joy killed thousands of people.}}

== Dreadgod ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 4''' — The Weeping Dragon uses Striker techniques that manifest as tiny serpentine dragons of blue-gold storm madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 10''' — The Weeping Dragon attacked Ziel's sect.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 19''' — The Weeping Dragon is a feared entity or concept.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 21''' — The Weeping Dragon is a miles-long sapphire dragon that swims over a sea of clouds.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 22''' — The Weeping Dragon left wreckage of Sha Miara's home.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 22''' — The Weeping Dragon will take care of someone before Reigan Shen gets a turn.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 23''' — The Weeping Dragon is headed toward Lindon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 24''' — The coming of the Weeping Dragon is signified by blue-and-gold lightning in the clouds.}}

== Waybound ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 3''' — Ziel is preparing to fight the Weeping Dragon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 4''' — The Weeping Dragon is expected to do Reigan Shen's job.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 4''' — The Weeping Dragon is a target to be killed.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 5''' — The Weeping Dragon is a Dreadgod.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 6''' — The Weeping Dragon's storm-clouds were approaching.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 9''' — The Weeping Dragon is a Dreadgod whose clouds approach the Ashwind continent.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 9''' — The Weeping Dragon is thousands of miles north.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 9''' — The Weeping Dragon is a target Lindon is waiting for.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 11''' — The Weeping Dragon is a Dreadgod that has absorbed power from the Silent King's death.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 11''' — The arrival of the Weeping Dragon is a condition for the duel.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 11''' — Malice hopes Lindon will be food for the Weeping Dragon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 13''' — The Weeping Dragon storm fills the northern sky.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 13''' — The Weeping Dragon is one of Yerin's targets.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 13''' — The Weeping Dragon was close.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 14''' — The Weeping Dragon's voice sounds like thunder.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 14''' — The Weeping Dragon is associated with hungry lightning.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 16''' — The Weeping Dragon is a being whose direct strike Yushi survived.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 17''' — Lindon intended to face the Weeping Dragon with seven companions.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 18''' — The Weeping Dragon is a battle occurring on the Rosegold continent.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 18''' — The Weeping Dragon is clever and acts like a rampaging monster.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 18''' — The Weeping Dragon's strength grew due to the demise of the Slumbering Wraith and the Silent King.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 18''' — The Weeping Dragon is like the Wandering Titan on the outside but the Silent King on the inside.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 18''' — The Weeping Dragon can cloud possibilities and dodge predictions.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 18''' — The Weeping Dragon's breath is the strongest offensive technique on the planet.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 18''' — The Weeping Dragon's breath cannot be defended against, only evaded.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 19''' — Lindon clashed against the Weeping Dragon with Orthos and Little Blue behind him.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 19''' — The Weeping Dragon commanded the Penance arrow away.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 19''' — The Weeping Dragon uses a dragon's breath technique that devours aura.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 19''' — The Weeping Dragon's dragon's breath involves blue-and-yellow madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 19''' — The Weeping Dragon is a Dreadgod that has hidden threads of Fate behind clouds.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 19''' — The Weeping Dragon possesses a dragon's pride that will not bend.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 19''' — The Weeping Dragon's gaze can crush spirits and strip away hope.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 19''' — The Weeping Dragon drags dark clouds around everywhere.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 19''' — The Weeping Dragon is thrashing around the landscape like a dying snake.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 20''' — The Weeping Dragon's presence causes storm clouds and rain.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 20''' — The Weeping Dragon's eyes focus on Yerin and its rage causes wind and lightning storms.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 20''' — The Weeping Dragon has a claw that trails lightning.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 20''' — The Weeping Dragon's authority can crush Yerin.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 20''' — The Weeping Dragon's will is described as fierce as a storm and imposing as the greatest of dragons.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 20''' — The Weeping Dragon killed Ziel's friends once before.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 20''' — The Dreadgod (Weeping Dragon) died.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 21''' — The Weeping Dragon was a Dreadgod that was defeated in battle.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 21''' — The Weeping Dragon attacked Yerin with the full force of its will to cause her injuries intentionally.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 21''' — The Weeping Dragon's core binding is a golden jewel as long as Lindon's arm.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 21''' — The Weeping Dragon has a core binding.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 23''' — The Weeping Dragon is a battle Emriss may have sensed.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 23''' — Information on the Weeping Dragon is limited.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 23''' — It is theoretically possible to create a method of transportation from the Weeping Dragon's madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 30''' — The Weeping Dragon's breath began to form.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 32''' — The Weeping Dragon has madra that an Overlord-level entity can almost handle a portion of.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 33''' — Lindon mentions the Weeping Dragon in relation to Del’rek's Path.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 36''' — The Weeping Dragon's breath slashed across the face of a moon.}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 1''' — The Tidewalkers were devastated by the Weeping Dragon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 3''' — The Weeping Dragon left a scar across the face of the moon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 7''' — The blue scales of the Weeping Dragon wrap Lindon in a lightning-crackling embrace.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
